details.title: \textbf{Job Portal Platform}
descriptions: Building a Job Portal Platform for the Tech Industry to connect the candidates with the best opportunities.
Developed the Backend from scratch on baremetal, supported by a PostgreSQL database for scalable data management.
details.scale: Tech Job Portal platform with AI-powered matching and automation

details.title: \textbf{Lead Management \& Analytics Platform}
descriptions: Lead the Product from Scratch to a point where it is self-sustaining, generating leads and revenue.
Developed lead management platform for the sales, enabling efficient tracking of large datasets.
Built AI Powered tools that automates human-like analysis of leads, providing actionable insights.
Upgraded the Product analysis performance by \textbf{80\%} by enhancing the Data Model and the Analysis Pipeline.
Hosted Custom Generic Models to cater the needs of the product which saves us from cost of generic models.
details.languages: Stack:- AWS, Node.js, Postgres, Azure, Data Modeling
details.scale: Scaling from \textbf{0 to 20K+ monthly revenue} with efficient lead tracking

details.title: \textbf{Automated Resume \& Portfolio System}
descriptions: Built an automated system that generates multiple resume variants and a portfolio website from JSON.
Implemented LuaTeX-based PDF generation with custom LaTeX templates for professional resume.
Integrated Jekyll static site generator to automatically create and deploy portfolio website from the same data.
Eliminated manual resume updates - simply edit JSON files to regenerate all resume variants and website simultaneously.
details.languages: Stack:- LuaTeX, LaTeX, Jekyll, Ruby, Lua, JSON
details.scale: Single source of truth generating \textbf{4 resume variants + portfolio website}
